_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: Only 16 proteins in the proteome dataset were found to be significantly upregulated with a Log 2 FC > 1, while 93 proteins were downregulated
details: Successfully performed statistical analysis identifying significantly upregulated and downregulated proteins with specific Log2 fold change thresholds
